subject: Update on your best.football camp submission
body:
Camp Submission Update

Thank you for submitting {camp_name} to best.football.

After review, we're unfortunately unable to list your camp at this time. This may be due to incomplete information, duplicate listings, or other quality guidelines.

If you believe this was made in error or would like to resubmit with additional information, please reply to this email and we'll be happy to help.

Best regards,
The best.football Team
